item.title: Hegseth: US 'Ironclad' Blockade on Iran 'Going Global'
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth said Friday the United States has imposed an "ironclad blockade" on Iran that is tightening "by the hour," with U.S. naval ...

item.title: Rep. Griffith to Newsmax: Court Likely to Block Va. Redistricting Referendum

item.title: Trump: Scrap 2020 Election If SPLC Fraud Proven
